name: 3D Scene Basic
description: The foundational 3D scene template: a Geometry COMP with a sphere SOP (render+display flagged), a Camera COMP pulled back along +Z, a Light COMP, and a Render TOP outputting to a Null TOP. Mirrors what `create_3d_scene` builds at its simplest (single primitive, no instancing). Use as a starting point for 3D visuals — bind RotateY to a tempo ramp or audio feature to make it move, or swap the sphereSOP for boxSOP / gridSOP. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: geo
nodes.comment: Container for the rendered geometry; default torus is cleared when shape becomes the render

nodes.name: shape
nodes.comment: Sphere primitive — render+display flagged so geo renders this instead of the default torus

nodes.name: cam
nodes.comment: Camera pulled back along +Z so the sphere is in frame

nodes.name: render
nodes.comment: Render TOP reads its scene from parameters (camera/geometry/lights), not wires

parameters.name: camera_z
parameters.label: Camera Z (Zoom)
parameters.description: Distance of the camera from the origin — larger = scene appears smaller.

parameters.name: geo_ry
parameters.label: Rotate Y
parameters.description: Whole-scene rotation around Y. Bind to a tempo ramp or audio feature for motion (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only).

preview_description: A single shaded sphere centred in the frame, lit from the upper-right by a key light — the bare-bones 3D scene every 3D recipe expands on.
